movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.title: The Matrix
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.plot: A computer hacker learns from rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.plot: Humanity finds a mysterious monolith on the moon and sends a spacecraft to Jupiter with the sentient computer HAL 9000.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.title: Blade Runner 2049
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.plot: A young blade runner's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard, who's been missing for thirty years.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.title: Upgrade
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.plot: After a mugging leaves him paralyzed, a man receives an experimental computer chip implant that allows him to control his body again.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.title: Altered Carbon
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.plot: In a future where consciousness can be transferred to new bodies, a former soldier is hired to solve a murder.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.title: Ghost in the Shell
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.plot: A cyborg policewoman hunts a mysterious hacker known as the Puppet Master in a technologically advanced future.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.title: Dredd
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.plot: In a violent, futuristic city, a judge teams with a trainee to take down a drug lord operating from a 200-story slum tower.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.title: Blade Runner
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:075b7096-763a-.plot: A retired blade runner is forced to hunt down replicants, bioengineered beings, in a dystopian future Los Angeles.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.title: Breathless
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.plot: A small-time thief steals a car and impulsively murders a motorcycle policeman, then tries to persuade a girlfriend to flee to Italy with him.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.title: Jules and Jim
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.plot: Decades in the life of a love triangle involving two friends and an impulsive woman they both adore.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.title: Shoot the Piano Player
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.plot: A former concert pianist working as a bar pianist gets drawn into his brothers' criminal troubles.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:690d995f-f6b7-.title: Kingdom
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:690d995f-f6b7-.plot: In Korea's Joseon period, a crown prince investigates a mysterious plague that turns the dead into ravenous monsters, uncovering a political conspiracy.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:690d995f-f6b7-.title: The Wailing
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:690d995f-f6b7-.plot: A policeman investigates a mysterious illness and deaths in a remote village, where a stranger is suspected of being involved with dark shamanistic rituals.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:690d995f-f6b7-.title: Gonjiam: Haunted Asylum
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:690d995f-f6b7-.plot: A crew livestreams from an abandoned asylum notorious for paranormal activity, but their horror show turns terrifyingly real.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:78d64353-337e-.title: Horrors of Malformed Men
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:78d64353-337e-.plot: A medical student escapes an asylum and travels to a remote island where a mad scientist is creating grotesque human experiments.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:78d64353-337e-.title: The Snow Woman
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:78d64353-337e-.plot: A woodcarver encounters a supernatural snow spirit who spares his life on the condition he never speaks of her, testing his vow years later.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:78d64353-337e-.title: Jigoku
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:78d64353-337e-.plot: A theology student is dragged into a series of tragic events that lead him to a vividly depicted Buddhist hell of torture and demons.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:78d64353-337e-.title: Hausu
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:78d64353-337e-.plot: A schoolgirl and her six friends visit her aunt's country house, which turns out to be a supernatural entity that devours them one by one in bizarre ways.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:78d64353-337e-.title: Kwaidan
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:78d64353-337e-.plot: An anthology of four supernatural tales adapted from Japanese folk stories, featuring ghosts, snow spirits, and haunted samurai.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:92419e89-efd6-.plot: A mysterious stranger arrives in a Mexican border town and plays two rival families against each other for his own profit.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:92419e89-efd6-.plot: Two bounty hunters with the same target form an uneasy alliance to track down a ruthless outlaw.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:92419e89-efd6-.plot: A mysterious harmonica-playing stranger protects a widow from a ruthless assassin working for the railroad.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:92419e89-efd6-.plot: A Mexican bandit and an Irish revolutionary team up during the Mexican Revolution, with conflicting motives.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.title: Psycho
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.plot: A secretary embezzles money and checks into a remote motel run by a troubled young man and his domineering mother.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.plot: A young farm boy joins a rebellion to rescue a princess and destroy a planet-destroying space station.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.plot: Three gunslingers compete to find a fortune in buried Confederate gold amid the chaos of the American Civil War.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.plot: After discovering a mysterious monolith on the moon, humanity sets off on a voyage to Jupiter with the sentient computer HAL 9000.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.title: Rosemary's Baby
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.plot: A young pregnant woman grows increasingly suspicious that her elderly neighbors are part of a Satanic cult targeting her unborn child.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.title: The French Connection
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.plot: Two NYPD detectives pursue a heroin shipment from France, leading to a dangerous cat-and-mouse game with a sophisticated drug lord.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.plot: A surreal sketch comedy series that revolutionized television humor with its absurd, satirical, and often anarchic style.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.title: Blade Runner
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.plot: A retired blade runner is forced to hunt down replicants, bioengineered beings, in a dystopian future Los Angeles.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.plot: Five high school students from different cliques spend a Saturday in detention and discover they have more in common than they thought.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.plot: A research team in Antarctica is hunted by a shape-shifting alien that assumes the appearance of its victims.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:all.plot: A low-level bureaucrat in a dystopian society becomes obsessed with a woman from his dreams and rebels against the system.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:b1cb07c2-f8ee-.plot: The late Mitch Hedberg delivers his unique brand of one-liner comedy in this stand-up special, filled with absurd observations and deadpan delivery.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:b1cb07c2-f8ee-.plot: A 1950s housewife discovers a talent for stand-up comedy after her marriage falls apart, navigating the male-dominated comedy scene of New York.
